recapPrompt.prompt: If the fast pointer reaches null, what does that tell us?

choices.label: The path ended and there is no cycle
choices.feedback: Correct. Reaching null means the path does not loop forever.

choices.label: The cycle start was found
choices.feedback: Not this one. Null means the path ended.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Explain why speed differences can reveal structure in a path or process.

practiceChallenge.title: Mastery check: rebuild the main clues
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it returns the main fast-and-slow meanings without the walkthrough.
hints: When fast finishes, slow is near the middle.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Pass. You rebuilt the main fast-and-slow clues from memory.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Needs practice. Recheck what end, meeting, and halfway each mean.

blanks.label: Meaning when fast reaches the end
Meaning when fast finishes before slow
